text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan : Lebanese President Joseph Aoun refused to speak with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu because the step was “too fast." The source said such a conversation should take place in the final stages of negotiations, not before they have begun. Aoun fears that Hezbollah would “hold it against him” and destabilise his rule, especially after the group has already been inflamed by this week’s historic meeting between Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors in Washington. Aoun reportedly briefed the Sunni prime minister, the Shia parliament speaker and the Druze leader on his refusal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩拒绝与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通话，因为这一举动“太快了”。消息人士称，此类对话应在谈判最后阶段进行，而不是在谈判开始之前。奥恩担心真主党会“以此为借口”针对他并破坏其统治，特别是在该组织因本周以色列和黎巴嫩大使在华盛顿的历史性会晤而感到愤怒之后。据报道，奥恩已向逊尼派总理、什叶派议长和德鲁兹派领导人通报了他的拒绝决定。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Ukrainian drones struck the oil storge facility at the Tuapse oil refinery in Russia's Krasnodar Krai region early this Thursday morning. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The oil terminal of Tuapse has burned through the day following an Ukrainian drone attack. Black smoke can be seen pushed 150km south over the Black Sea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺周四清晨，乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯克拉斯诺达尔边疆区图阿普谢炼油厂的储油设施。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 在乌克兰无人机袭击后，图阿普谢石油码头燃烧了一整天。可以看到黑烟向南飘散至150公里外的黑海上方。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Three Syrian army personnel were killed and others wounded, in addition to material damage, by the explosion of war remnants in the town of Qarfa. These remnants had previously been dismantled from various locations in Daraa Governorate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 三名叙利亚军队人员在卡尔法镇因战争遗留爆炸物爆炸而丧生，另有多人受伤，并造成物质损失。这些遗留物此前是从德拉省的各个地点拆除的。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: Gulf and European officials believe a comprehensive deal between the United States and Iran could take six months to finalize. There is growing pressure to extend the current ceasefire to allow time for negotiations to progress and avoid a return to conflict. Regional leaders are also urging the immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to stabilise global energy flows, warning that prolonged disruption could trigger further spikes in oil prices and even contribute to a global food crisis if the situation continues. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：海湾和欧洲官员认为，美国和伊朗之间的全面协议可能需要六个月才能最终敲定。目前要求延长现有停火协议的压力越来越大，以便为谈判取得进展争取时间，并避免冲突重演。地区领导人还敦促立即重新开放霍尔木兹海峡以稳定全球能源流动，并警告称，如果局势持续下去，长期的中断可能会引发油价进一步飙升，甚至导致全球粮食危机。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇷 Three supertankers were seen today being loaded with oil at the terminals of Kharg island. Despite the ongoing US naval blockade, Iran continues to load ships. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇷 今天看到三艘超级油轮在哈尔克岛码头装载石油。尽管美国海军实施了封锁，伊朗仍在继续装载船只。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 BREAKING: Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel beginning at 5 PM EST, following conversations with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Trump states the two leaders met for the first…" The last time USA imposed a ceasefire in Lebanon, infamous traitor Jonathan Pollard said nukes should fly. Six months ago, Jonathan Pollard explained what he thinks Israel should do when Washington imposes a ceasefire: threaten to use nuclear weapons, and be ready to follow through. Pollard recounted October 1973, when Henry Kissinger cut off arms during the Yom Kippur War to extract concessions. Israel parked an A4 Skyhawk at Tel Nof airbase with unconventional weapons under its wings and told Washington to "take a good look." The airlifts restarted the next day. When asked if Israel should make the same threat now, Pollard said: "Absolutely, except this time, I want us to go forward with it if necessary." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 快讯：特朗普宣布，在与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡通话后，黎巴嫩和以色列之间将于美国东部时间下午5点开始为期10天的停火。特朗普表示，两位领导人会面了……” 上次美国在黎巴嫩实施停火时，臭名昭著的叛徒乔纳森·波拉德曾称应该动用核武器。六个月前，乔纳森·波拉德解释了他认为当华盛顿强加停火时以色列应该怎么做：威胁使用核武器，并准备付诸行动。波拉德讲述了1973年10月的情况，当时亨利·基辛格在赎罪日战争期间切断了武器供应以获取让步。以色列在特尔诺夫空军基地停放了一架机翼下挂载非常规武器的A4天鹰攻击机，并告诉华盛顿“好好看看”。空运第二天就恢复了。当被问及以色列现在是否应该发出同样的威胁时，波拉德说：“绝对应该，只是这一次，如果必要的话，我希望我们真的付诸行动。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 🇳🇱 Zelensky’s interpreter was caught swearing into a live mic after a press conference with the Dutch prime minister. Via: Margarita Simonyan 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇳🇱 泽连斯基的翻译在与荷兰首相举行新闻发布会后，在直播麦克风前被抓到爆粗口。来源：玛格丽塔·西蒙尼扬 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 After several days of sustained U.S. pressure on Israel to facilitate a broader agreement with Iran, it appears Washington has achieved a result. Today, Donald Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon have reached a 10-day ceasefire. At first glance, Lebanon’s role may seem unexpected, but the context matters. As part of negotiations with the United States, Iran demanded a ceasefire in Lebanon — effectively requiring Israel to halt its strikes against Hezbollah. However, Israel cannot formally sign an agreement with Hezbollah, which it designates as a terrorist organization. As a workaround, and with U.S. mediation, formal negotiations were conducted between Israel and Lebanon, ultimately resulting in this temporary 10-day ceasefire arrangement. At the same time, according to Israeli media reports, government ministers are outraged that Trump publicly announced the ceasefire before it had been reviewed and approved by Israel’s security cabinet. It is also worth noting that Pakistan’s Chief of Army Staff, who has been actively involved in mediating U.S.–Iran talks, traveled to Tehran yesterday and is now en route to Washington. This likely signals ongoing discussions and exchanges regarding the expected agreement. Overall, Trump appears determined to secure a deal with Iran at almost any cost, particularly ahead of his planned visit to China in early May. In pursuit of this objective, he has not hesitated to apply pressure on Israel. For reference, the current interim ceasefire period with Iran is set to expire on April 22. Multiple influential media outlets suggest that Trump is likely to extend it by several more weeks. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 在美国持续数日向以色列施压以促成其与伊朗达成更广泛协议后，华盛顿似乎取得了成果。今天，唐纳德·特朗普宣布以色列和黎巴嫩已达成一项为期10天的停火协议。乍一看，黎巴嫩的角色可能显得出人意料，但背景很重要。作为与美国谈判的一部分，伊朗要求黎巴嫩停火——实际上是要求以色列停止对真主党的打击。然而，以色列无法正式与被其定性为恐怖组织的真主党签署协议。作为一种变通办法，并在美国的调解下，以色列和黎巴嫩之间进行了正式谈判，最终达成了这项为期10天的临时停火安排。与此同时，据以色列媒体报道，政府部长们对特朗普在停火协议未经以色列安全内阁审查和批准之前就公开宣布感到愤怒。同样值得注意的是，一直积极参与调解美伊会谈的巴基斯坦陆军参谋长昨天前往德黑兰，目前正在前往华盛顿的途中。这很可能预示着有关预期协议的持续讨论和交流。总的来说，特朗普似乎决心不惜一切代价与伊朗达成协议，特别是在他计划于5月初访问中国之前。为了实现这一目标，他不惜向以色列施压。作为参考，目前与伊朗的临时停火期定于4月22日结束。多家有影响力的媒体暗示，特朗普很可能会将其延长数周。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @glcarlstrom : "As many as 12m jobs, nearly half of Iran's workforce, are at risk from furloughs or layoffs... the disruption to the steel industry alone threatens more than 5.5m jobs, along with another 1.2m jobs at risk in petrochemical and pharmaceuticals. The sectors hit hardest by US and Israeli airstrikes represent the core pillars of employment and production." https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/irans-war-shattered-economy-means-it-has-an-urgent-reason-to-negotiate-43937f36?mod=middle-east_news_article_pos2 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @glcarlstrom : “多达1200万个工作岗位，即伊朗近一半的劳动力，正面临休假或裁员的风险……仅钢铁行业的动荡就威胁到超过550万个工作岗位，石化和制药行业还有120万个工作岗位面临风险。受美国和以色列空袭打击最严重的行业代表了就业和生产的核心支柱。” https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/irans-war-shattered-economy-means-it-has-an-urgent-reason-to-negotiate-43937f36?mod=middle-east_news_article_pos2 推文

text: OSINTdefender Post made by Pope Leo XIV, the Head of the Catholic Church, minutes after this statement by U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, in which he stated while in Cameroon: “Woe to those who manipulate religion and the very name of God for their own military, economic, and political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth.” Speaking during today’s Pentagon press conference, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth compared the American media and journalists that criticize President Trump, with the Pharisees, a Jewish sect in the first century that clashed and denied Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯发表声明几分钟后，天主教会领袖教皇利奥十四世发布了帖子。赫格塞斯在喀麦隆时表示：“祸哉那些为了自己的军事、经济和政治利益而操纵宗教和上帝之名，将神圣之物拖入黑暗和污秽中的人。”在今天的五角大楼新闻发布会上，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将批评特朗普总统的美国媒体和记者比作法利赛人，这是一个在公元一世纪与耶稣基督发生冲突并否认他的犹太教派。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel David Azulai, head of the Metula Council (Northern Israel) and a member of Yisrael Beiteinu, responding to the ceasefire in the north: “Northern residents feel betrayed once again today. That’s how we felt during ‘Swords of Iron,’ and that’s how we feel now. The fact that the President of the United States is the one announcing the ceasefire only highlights how disconnected Israel’s prime minister is from the public and from the reality of the northern residents.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 梅图拉委员会（以色列北部）负责人、以色列是我们的家园党成员大卫·阿祖莱在回应北部停火时表示：“北部居民今天再次感到被背叛了。我们在‘铁剑’行动期间就是这种感觉，现在也是这种感觉。美国总统亲自宣布停火这一事实，只会凸显以色列总理与公众以及北部居民的现实是多么脱节。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam: He welcomes President Trump’s ceasefire announcement, calling it a central Lebanese demand pursued since the first day of the war and a primary objective in their meeting in Washington on Tuesday. He thanked regional and international efforts, especially the U.S., France, the European Union, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt, as well as Qatar and Jordan. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆：他欢迎特朗普总统的停火声明，称这是黎巴嫩自战争第一天起就追求的核心要求，也是他们周二在华盛顿会晤的主要目标。他感谢了区域和国际社会的努力，特别是美国、法国、欧盟、沙特阿拉伯和埃及，以及卡塔尔和约旦。推文

text: WarMonitor A federal judge has scaled back Trump’s White House ballroom plans, allowing construction to proceed on a military-approved underground section while blocking the ballroom itself. “National security is not a blank check to proceed with otherwise unlawful activity.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044825110696108098/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一名联邦法官缩减了特朗普的白宫宴会厅计划，允许在军事批准的地下部分进行施工，但阻止了宴会厅本身的建设。“国家安全不是进行非法活动的空白支票。” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044825110696108098/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu to ministers: President Trump asked me for a ceasefire, and I agreed to his request. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044824849458118898/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡对部长们说：特朗普总统要求我停火，我同意了他的请求。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044824849458118898/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Lebanese MP from Hezbollah Hassan Fadlallah told Lebanon’s Al Mayadeen: “We learned today from the Iranian ambassador in Beirut that Iranian efforts led to a comprehensive ceasefire in Lebanon. The American side committed to informing the Israeli prime minister of this decision, as well as conveying it to the president of Lebanon.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 来自真主党的黎巴嫩议员哈桑·法德拉拉告诉黎巴嫩广场电视台：“我们今天从伊朗驻贝鲁特大使那里得知，伊朗的努力促成了黎巴嫩的全面停火。美方承诺将此决定通知以色列总理，并将其传达给黎巴嫩总统。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu to ministers: We will remain in the security zone during the ceasefire. Wherever we are, we stay. I would like to hear the rules of this new imposed ceasefire. Can Hezbollah have any movement? Does Israel need to give up some gains in southern Lebanon? - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡对部长们说：停火期间我们将留在安全区。我们在哪里，就留在哪里。我想听听这个新强加的停火协议的规则。真主党可以有任何行动吗？以色列需要放弃在黎巴嫩南部的一些成果吗？ - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: This morning, Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander, addressed media at the Pentagon during a briefing on the blockade against ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. He highlighted his most recent trip to the Middle East where he visited with U.S. service members and engaged regional allies and partners. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部：今天上午，中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将在五角大楼举行的新闻发布会上向媒体发表讲话，介绍了针对试图进出伊朗港口的船只的封锁情况。他强调了他最近的中东之行，在那里他访问了美国军人并与区域盟友和伙伴进行了接触。推文

text: Open Source Intel Moshe Davidovich, head of the Mateh Asher Regional Council and chairman of the Confrontation Line Forum (Northern Israel border communities) responding to President Trump’s ceasefire announcement: “Agreements are signed in suits in Washington, but the price is paid here in blood, in destroyed homes, and in shattered communities in Mateh Asher and along the confrontation line. A ‘ceasefire’ that does not include lethal enforcement against Hezbollah for every violation, and a terror free security zone up to the Litani, is not a diplomatic achievement, it is a sentence to wait for the next massacre. Northern residents are not extras in an international public relations show.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿舍尔地区委员会负责人、对抗线论坛（以色列北部边境社区）主席摩西·大卫维奇在回应特朗普总统的停火声明时表示：“协议是在华盛顿穿着西装签署的，但代价是在这里用鲜血、被毁的家园以及阿舍尔和对抗线上破碎的社区来支付的。一项不包括对真主党每次违规行为进行致命执法，以及在利塔尼河前建立无恐怖分子安全区的‘停火’，不是外交成就，而是等待下一次大屠杀的判决。北部居民不是国际公关秀中的临时演员。”推文

text: OSINTdefender Speaking during today’s Pentagon press conference, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth compared the American media and journalists that criticize President Trump, with the Pharisees, a Jewish sect in the first century that clashed and denied Jesus Christ. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今天的五角大楼新闻发布会上，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将批评特朗普总统的美国媒体和记者比作法利赛人，这是一个在公元一世纪与耶稣基督发生冲突并否认他的犹太教派。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044823433930797311/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated On the night of April 16, Ukrainian Defense Forces' strike UAVs hit two Iskander SRBM bases in Crimea, a workshop and warehouse belonging to "Rubikon" in the Donetsk region, as well as enemy oil depots and SAM systems. Among the air defense targets destroyed were the Buk-M1, Osa-AK, and Pantsir systems, along with a Tunguska mockup. In total, 16 Russian targets were struck throughout the night. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 4月16日晚，乌克兰国防军的打击无人机袭击了克里米亚的两个伊斯坎德尔短程弹道导弹基地、顿涅茨克地区属于“Rubikon”的一个车间和仓库，以及敌方的油库和地对空导弹系统。被摧毁的防空目标包括Buk-M1、Osa-AK和Pantsir系统，以及一个通古斯卡模型。当晚总共袭击了16个俄罗斯目标。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Margaliot Moshav Chairman Eitan Davidi on news of forced ceasefire: “This is not a victory, it’s a disgrace, a complete surrender to Iran and the U.S.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列马加里奥特莫沙夫主席埃坦·大卫迪在得知强制停火的消息后表示：“这不是胜利，这是耻辱，是对伊朗和美国的彻底投降。”推文

text: Open Source Intel IRAN STATE MEDIA: IRAN'S PLANNED HORMUZ TOLL TO BE PAID VIA IRANIAN BANKS tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗官方媒体：伊朗计划征收的霍尔木兹海峡通行费将通过伊朗银行支付 推文

text: U.S. Central Command This morning, Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander, addressed media at the Pentagon during a briefing on the blockade against ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. He highlighted his most recent trip to the Middle East where he visited with U.S. service members and engaged regional allies and partners. tweet
text_zh: U.S. Central Command 今天上午，中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将在五角大楼举行的新闻发布会上向媒体发表讲话，介绍了针对试图进出伊朗港口的船只的封锁情况。他强调了他最近的中东之行，在那里他访问了美国军人并与区域盟友和伙伴进行了接触。推文

text: WarMonitor Police responded to a bomb threat at the home of Pope Leo’s brother in Illinois, evacuating nearby residents before determining it was a hoax. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044822360373571679/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 警方对教皇利奥兄弟在伊利诺伊州的家中发出的炸弹威胁做出了反应，在确定这是一场恶作剧之前疏散了附近的居民。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044822360373571679/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Knesset Member Dan Illouz from Netanyahu’s Likud party: “Decisiveness, a killer instinct. That’s what is required of us now. Our military achievements are enormous, but we must not be blinded. Hamas has not yet been destroyed, Hezbollah has not been disarmed, and the ayatollah regime still stands. It’s time to turn these achievements into real victory, not another round of temporary deterrence and ceasefires.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡利库德党的议会成员丹·伊卢兹：“果断，杀手本能。这就是我们现在所需要的。我们的军事成就巨大，但我们绝不能被蒙蔽。哈马斯尚未被摧毁，真主党尚未被解除武装，阿亚图拉政权依然存在。现在是时候将这些成就转化为真正的胜利，而不是另一轮暂时的威慑和停火。”推文

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Paramedics Killed in Consecutive Strikes on Wednesday as Israel Presses Ground and Air War in Southern Lebanon 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 周三，随着以色列在黎巴嫩南部推进地面和空中战争，医护人员在连续袭击中丧生 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Prime Minister of Lebanon Salam on 10-day ceasefire: I welcome the announcement of the ceasefire declared by President Trump, which is a central Lebanese demand we have pursued since the first day of the war, and was our primary goal in the Washington…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 DropSite: Hezbollah MP Ibrahim Moussawi said that Hezbollah will respect the ceasefire. "They went back to the same ceasefire agreement that has been reached to in Islamabad by the Iranian initiative. We will be respecting the ceasefire and we will deal with it cautiously, actually. And the Israelis have to abide by it completely, comprehensively in all of the Lebanese territories, including the areas bordering Palestine. And it should include total cessation of the hostilities and restraint to the movement of the Israelis to stop their assassinations. And it should hopefully be a beginning of a course of the Israeli withdrawal from our occupied territories." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理萨拉姆关于10天停火的声明：我欢迎特朗普总统宣布的停火，这是我们自战争第一天起就追求的核心黎巴嫩要求，也是我们周二在华盛顿会晤的主要目标……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 DropSite：真主党议员易卜拉欣·穆萨维表示，真主党将尊重停火。“他们回到了伊朗倡议在伊斯兰堡达成的同一停火协议。我们将尊重停火，实际上我们会谨慎对待。以色列人必须在所有黎巴嫩领土上完全、全面地遵守它，包括与巴勒斯坦接壤的地区。它应该包括全面停止敌对行动，并限制以色列人的行动以停止他们的暗杀。希望这将是以色列从我们被占领土撤军进程的开始。” @wfwitness

text: 🇪🇺 "Europe has maybe six weeks of jet fuel left." - IEA 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 “欧洲可能只剩下六周的喷气燃料了。” - 国际能源署 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: The ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will follow the same format as the 2024 version, with Israel retaining freedom of action to respond to "threats". @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Israel has agreed to a ceasefire in Lebanon at U.S. President Trump’s request, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu told ministers. No cabinet vote was held; ministers learned of the truce from Trump’s post. The ceasefire follows the November 2024 model: IDF forces will remain on the “ATGM line” (anti‑tank guided missile line) in southern Lebanon, not withdrawing from positions already seized. If a Hezbollah threat is identified, Israel may act to remove it. Netanyahu said Israel will stay in the security belt where it currently is. Opposition leaders condemned the move: Avigdor Lieberman called it a “betrayal of northern residents”; former chief of staff Gadi Eisenkot said Netanyahu fails to translate military achievements into political gains, leading to a third imposed ceasefire. Northern regional council heads warned that agreements signed in Washington are paid for in blood, demanding effective enforcement and a "terror‑free buffer zone" up to the Litani River. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火将遵循与2024年版本相同的格式，以色列保留对‘威胁’做出反应的行动自由。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡告诉部长们，应美国总统特朗普的要求，以色列已同意在黎巴嫩停火。没有举行内阁投票；部长们是从特朗普的帖子中得知休战消息的。停火遵循2024年11月的模式：以色列国防军部队将留在黎巴嫩南部的“反坦克导弹线”上，不会从已经占领的阵地撤出。如果发现真主党的威胁，以色列可以采取行动消除它。内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将留在目前的安保带。反对派领导人谴责了这一举动：阿维格多·利伯曼称其为“对北部居民的背叛”；前参谋长加迪·艾森科特表示，内塔尼亚胡未能将军事成就转化为政治收益，导致了第三次强加的停火。北部地区委员会负责人警告说，在华盛顿签署的协议是用鲜血支付的，要求有效执法，并建立一个直到利塔尼河的“无恐怖分子缓冲区”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 The United Kingdom and France are rushing to get into service cheaper missiles to intercept strike drones. The Royal Air Force is known to be integrating the proven American AKWS II laser-guided rocket on their Typhoon. Last month, the first picture one of them carrying a pair if LAU-131 rocket pods and a LITENING III targeting pod was published. Today the French test Rafale M1 was spotted with a SNEB rocket pod paired with a Talios targeting pod. The configuration is similar than the British one but uses domestic systems. The SNEB pod is not new but was never fitted on Rafales. It is able to carry 12 68mm laser-guided rockets. The system is stated to enter operational readiness as soon as this summer. Short-range, laser-guided, cost-effective missiles are expected to soon become the norm in advanced air forces. They are a proven way to counter strike drones, leveraging both the detection and interception capabilities of the fighter jet while staying cheaper and more available than the drones themselves. So far only the Americans have integrated this kind of system on a large scale. The Ukrainians have limited capabilities tho little information is known on them. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 英国和法国正竞相投入使用更便宜的导弹来拦截打击无人机。众所周知，英国皇家空军正在将久经考验的美国AKWS II激光制导火箭集成到他们的台风战斗机上。上个月，发布了其中一架携带一对LAU-131火箭吊舱和LITENING III瞄准吊舱的照片。今天，法国测试的阵风M1战斗机被发现携带了一个SNEB火箭吊舱，并配有一个Talios瞄准吊舱。该配置与英国的类似，但使用了国产系统。SNEB吊舱并不新鲜，但从未安装在阵风战斗机上。它能够携带12枚68毫米激光制导火箭。该系统预计将于今年夏天投入作战准备。短程、激光制导、具有成本效益的导弹预计很快将成为先进空军的常态。它们是反击打击无人机的行之有效的方法，既利用了战斗机的探测和拦截能力，又比无人机本身更便宜、更易获得。到目前为止，只有美国大规模集成了这种系统。乌克兰的能力有限，尽管关于它们的信息知之甚少。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli jets over Beirut and its suburbs. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli jets break the sound barrier over the Bekaa area at a very low altitude. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列战机飞越贝鲁特及其郊区。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列战机在贝卡地区超低空飞行并突破音障。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Daraa24: Two people were killed and seven others injured in explosions at an explosives and weapons warehouse in the Al-Ghazzali compound on the Daraa–Damascus highway, according to a medical source. The victims and injured were transported to a hospital in the city of Izraa. Unconfirmed reports suggest the incident may have been caused by an Israeli strike, though this has not been independently verified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Daraa24：据医疗消息来源称，大马士革至德拉高速公路旁 Al-Ghazzali 大院内的一个爆炸物和武器仓库发生爆炸，造成两人死亡，七人受伤。死伤者已被送往伊兹拉市的一家医院。未经证实的报道称，此次事件可能是由以色列的空袭引起的，但这尚未得到独立核实。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🎪 🤡 🇮🇷 The Democrats War Powers Resolution , aimed at blocking President Trump from continuing Operation Epstein's Fury, has failed in the House by a vote of 213–214 . 🐻 WWE/Kardashians/OF/Grinder mash-up show, aka "US politics", continues. Pure cinema. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : A man who filmed an F-15 crash in Kuwait has been jailed since March 2, and his X and Instagram accounts have been taken down. His arrest comes amid a broader wave in which hundreds have been detained for filming similar incidents, with critics calling it a crackdown on dissent. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044184652227764537/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：一名拍摄了科威特 F-15 坠机事件的男子自 3 月 2 日起被监禁，他的 X 和 Instagram 账号已被注销。他的被捕发生在一场更广泛的浪潮中，数百人因拍摄类似事件而被拘留，批评者称这是对异议的镇压。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044184652227764537/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel TOTAL BLUNDER. DISASTER. GIVING LIFE TO HEZBOLLAH. IRAN IS NOW CONTROLLING HOW ISRAEL BEHAVES IN LEBANON. THIS IS A BIG MISTAKE. Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 彻底的失误。灾难。给真主党注入了生命。伊朗现在正在控制以色列在黎巴嫩的行为。这是一个巨大的错误。特朗普：我刚刚与黎巴嫩受人尊敬的约瑟夫·奥恩总统和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期 10 天的停火，时间从美东时间下午 5 点开始。周二，两国 34 年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区，与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥会面。我已指示副总统 JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉辛·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的 9 场战争，这将是我的第 10 场，所以让我们把它完成吧！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: WarMonitor Army Secretary Dan Driscoll is being questioned in Congress after clashing with the Defense Secretary over the abrupt firing of senior Army leaders during an active war. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044816686734299184/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel I’m sorry. Israel and Lebanon were never at war. Netanyahu shoudl have announced this, not president Trump. This is a major win for the Islamic regime, and Hezbollah. This is not what the people of Israel wanted. They want to finish up Hezbollah already. Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 很抱歉。以色列和黎巴嫩从未处于战争状态。内塔尼亚胡应该宣布这一点，而不是特朗普总统。这对伊斯兰政权和真主党来说是一个重大胜利。这不是以色列人民想要的。他们想彻底解决真主党。特朗普：我刚刚与黎巴嫩受人尊敬的约瑟夫·奥恩总统和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期 10 天的停火，时间从美东时间下午 5 点开始。周二，两国 34 年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区，与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥会面。我已指示副总统 JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉辛·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的 9 场战争，这将是我的第 10 场，所以让我们把它完成吧！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @NadavPollak : I think that a ceasefire is a positive development but several quick thoughts: 1. Insane that Israelis hear on a ceasefire from Trump and not Bibi. 2. This is not the end of the war as Trump put it. The underlying reasons for escalation are still here. 3. It appears that Trump might be giving Iran a small win here by announcing a ceasefire as they wanted. 4. Anyone still thinks that Trump does what Bibi wishes? Bibi really didn’t want this ceasefire and still Trump decided to do it. 5. Bibi has several problems politically now - he promised to defeat Hezbollah (he did not). He promised to remove the Iranian threat (he did not, yet). Elections are soon and Bibi is in a bind 🚨 🚨 Trump on Truth Social: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! - Barak Ravid tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @NadavPollak：我认为停火是一个积极的发展，但有几个快速的想法：1. 以色列人从特朗普而不是比比那里听到停火的消息，这太疯狂了。2. 这并不是特朗普所说的战争结束。升级的根本原因仍然存在。3. 看起来特朗普可能通过宣布停火给了伊朗一个小小的胜利，正如他们所愿。4. 还有人认为特朗普会做比比希望的事吗？比比真的不想要这次停火，但特朗普还是决定这么做。5. 比比现在在政治上有几个问题——他承诺击败真主党（他没有做到）。他承诺消除伊朗威胁（他还没有做到）。选举即将到来，比比陷入了困境 🚨 🚨 特朗普在 Truth Social 上写道：我刚刚与黎巴嫩受人尊敬的约瑟夫·奥恩总统和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期 10 天的停火，时间从美东时间下午 5 点开始。周二，两国 34 年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区，与我们伟大的国务卿马可·卢比奥会面。我已指示副总统 JD·万斯和国务卿卢比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉辛·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。我有幸解决了世界各地的 9 场战争，这将是我的第 10 场，所以让我们把它完成吧！ - Barak Ravid 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon Reports: Israeli airstrikes hitting multiple towns in southern Lebanon ahead of the ceasefire taking effect. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩报道：在停火生效前，以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部的多个城镇。推文

text: Open Source Intel Worth noting that Hezbollah leader said he would not respect a ceasefire. As far as I’m concerned, Israel isn’t at war with Lebanon. Israel is at war with the Hezbollah terror organization operating from Hezbollah controlled areas in Lebanon. I don’t see any reason for an Israeli ceasefire with “Lebanon” if there is no war, and I don’t see any reason for a ceasefire with Hezbollah based on the Islamic regime’s demands. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 值得注意的是，真主党领导人表示他不会遵守停火协议。就我而言，以色列并没有与黎巴嫩开战。以色列是在与在黎巴嫩真主党控制区活动的真主党恐怖组织开战。如果根本没有战争，我不认为以色列有任何理由与“黎巴嫩”停火，我也不认为有任何理由基于伊斯兰政权的要求与真主党停火。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli official to the Jerusalem Post: The IDF will continue to maintain its positions and areas in southern Lebanon where it is currently deployed during the ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列官员对《耶路撒冷邮报》表示：在停火期间，以色列国防军将继续保持其目前在黎巴嫩南部的阵地和区域。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah MP Hassan Fadlallah to Al Mayadeen: "We learned today from the Iranian ambassador in Beirut that Iranian efforts led to a comprehensive ceasefire in Lebanon. The American side undertook to inform the Prime Minister of Israel of this decision." "The renewal of Iran's negotiations with the USA is conditional on the implementation of this commitment." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉对“广场电视台”表示：“我们今天从伊朗驻贝鲁特大使那里得知，伊朗的努力促成了黎巴嫩的全面停火。美方承诺将此决定通知以色列总理。”“伊朗与美国恢复谈判的条件是落实这一承诺。”推文

text: Nuno Felix Do it Dima, lets get this over with! When strikes become a reality depends on what comes next. Sleep well, European partners! - Dmitry Medvedev tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 动手吧迪马，让我们结束这一切！俄罗斯国防部的声明必须按字面意思理解：制造无人机和其他设备的欧洲设施名单是俄罗斯武装部队的潜在目标名单。打击何时成为现实取决于接下来会发生什么。睡个好觉，欧洲伙伴们！ - 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Fox News’ Jennifer Griffin has confirmed Iran used a Chinese spy satellite to monitor U.S. bases in the Middle East last month after the IRGC gained access shortly after launch. https://x.com/Acyn/status/2044546090155053504/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：福克斯新闻的詹妮弗·格里芬证实，伊朗在伊斯兰革命卫队发射后不久获得访问权限，并利用一颗中国间谍卫星在上个月监视了美国在中东的基地。https://x.com/Acyn/status/2044546090155053504/video/1 推文
